case_title: MARGARITA HARO VALENZUELA VS. ELENA RIVAS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENZUELA, MARGARITA HARO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALENZUELA, MARGARITA HARO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RIVAS, ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY VALENZUELA, MARGARITA HARO AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARGARITA HARO VALENZUELA; COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELENA RIVAS WHO WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
